name: 5.7oz Ribbed Cassin Martini Glass - Threshold™
description:
Elevate your cocktail hour with this Ribbed Cassin Martini Glass from Threshold™. Made of glass, this transparent martini glass features a ribbed texture that beautifully highlights your signature martinis and other cocktails. Dishwasher safe, this 5.7-fluid-ounce glass adds a touch of sophistication to every sip.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
